text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Child Care & Parenting > Parenting Materials * Hispanic/Latino Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Disabilities Issues Hispanic/Latino Community Native American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES ABC LISTOS PARA APRENDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting trainings, educational home visits, parenting issues support groups, parenting materials, referrals, case management, and developmental screening. Offers parents support with guidance on how to deal with a child's tantrums, questions about a child's developmental stages, and alternative types of discipline. 7820 NE Holman Street Suite B5 Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Spanish speaking parents with children ages 0-5 or who are pregnant Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, some evening appointments available Email (503) 258-4200 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MORRISON CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES LISTOS PARA APRENDER
